summary: Comprehensive testing of iteration 3 — JWT auth (cookies), Admin Dashboard, Customer Account/Wishlist/Orders, multi-language inner pages. Backend: 45/45 pytest cases pass (22 new auth+admin + 23 regression). Frontend: admin login → /admin redirect works, all 7 admin tabs render with real stats (9 orders, ₹15,824 revenue, 3 customers, 6 products), customer register→/account, wishlist toggle, logout & protected-route redirects all work. Hindi & Gujarati translations render on Shop, Cart (Order Summary/Subtotal/Total translated), Login/Register, with persistence via localStorage drj_lang_v1.
critical_code_review_comments: Auth: bcrypt + JWT in httpOnly cookies (SameSite=none, Secure=true) — implemented correctly per playbook.
seed_admin is idempotent and updates password hash if env password changes — good.
Brute-force lockout: 5 failed attempts → 429 with 15-min lock confirmed (test_brute_force_lockout PASS).
Admin endpoints properly guarded via router-level Depends(require_admin) — customer gets 403, anon gets 401.
Orders correctly attach user_id when authenticated (verified by /api/me/orders containing the placed order).
Order status PATCH appends timeline event AND updates status — verified via /api/orders/track timeline.
Reseed endpoint now admin-protected (POST /api/admin/reseed returns 401 anon — confirmed).
MongoDB _id consistently excluded via projection {'_id': 0} across all endpoints — good.
Minor: CORS uses allow_origins=[FRONTEND_URL] not '*' (correct since credentials are sent). Solid.

Suggestion (non-blocking): /api/auth/login currently increments lockout count on every failed attempt and sets locked_until on each — works but could be simplified; existing logic is functionally correct.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@dharmarajayurveda.in / Dharmaraj@2026 (working). Test customer registered dynamically per test run.
seed_data_creation: Test created products/coupons/blogs via admin API are cleaned up by their own delete tests. Several TEST_* orders, contacts and a few customers (qa_*@drj.in) persist in DB from frontend e2e — acceptable as they demonstrate dashboard activity.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 is fully passing. Auth uses cookies with SameSite=none Secure=true — DO NOT downgrade. /api/admin/* requires admin role; /api/me/* requires any auth. Tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_auth_admin.py and /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py. Run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env var set (preview URL). Frontend translations work but only specific strings (Shop/Cart/Checkout/Blog/FAQ headers + Login/Register/Account labels) — body copy on About/Home/Founder is intentionally English per MVP scope.

playbook_compliance.cors_allow_credentials: PASS — allow_credentials=True with explicit FRONTEND_URL origin
playbook_compliance.brute_force_lockout_5_fails: PASS — 429 returned after 5 failed attempts within 15-min window
playbook_compliance.seed_admin_idempotent_updates_password: PASS — updates hash if env password differs

frontend_flows_verified: POST /api/auth/login → /admin redirect + dashboard renders with 9 orders / ₹15,824 / 3 customers / 6 products / 14-day daily chart / status breakdown
All 7 admin sidebar tabs render and switching works
POST /api/auth/register → /account redirect, all 3 account tabs (orders/wishlist/profile) visible
Wishlist toggle on /product/1-vajra adds + shows on /account wishlist tab
account-logout button clears session and redirects to /login
Language switch to Hindi: Shop hero, header nav, Cart Order Summary/Subtotal/Total, Login page fully translated
Language switch to Gujarati: Shop, Login fully translated
